reviews.review_description: I used to love playing this game so much. I didn’t play it for a little bit and then when I went to go play it again because I remembered I had it every time I try to play it it would show me a black screen and say error endeavors if you do read this, please fix this. I am not able to play anymore and this was one of my favorite games. I’ve also moved the five stars to a one star because of the mishaps, I hope that you could fix it and I can give you guys a better rating again because this game was so much fun and now I can’t even play it. I wonder if anyone else is having this problem ￼

Hello developers, I’m experiencing a serious issue with Attack on Titan VR: Unbreakable on Meta Quest 3S.

I was able to play normally before and had full progress (I completed the game twice). After closing the game and trying to reopen it later, it now crashes every time on startup.

What happens:

- Game starts normally (intro animation)
- Screen goes black
- “ERROR” message appears
- Game closes to Quest home

Important:

- Only this game is affected (others work fine)
- It worked earlier the same day
- A friend can open the game normally

What I tried:

- Restarting headset
- Reinstalling
- Clearing cache
- Checking updates

Temporary workaround:

- Clearing ALL game data lets it open again
- But progress is reset
- After playing and closing, the crash returns

It seems the game fails to load saved data after closing, causing a crash loop unless progress is wiped.

Device: Meta Quest 3S

Please help, this makes the game unplayable. Thank you.

reviews.review_title: Incredible game! But please add more
reviews.review_description:
This is one of my favorite vr games it truly makes you feel like you are apart of the scouts. But I do hope they add more stuff. It’s a great game but I feel like there’s so many things they could add to it like more story quests, new locations like the forest, the ability to turn into a titan. Just so many cool things they can do! 

Overall 10/10 game I just hope they add more stuff :)

Don’t get me wrong, when I was playing this it was LOADS of fun, I loved it, all of it. But now whenever I open the game, the wings of freedom show up, then it goes to a black screen that just says error in small writing and then sends me back to the main menu (game crashes)

I bought this for my son who was having a lot of fun with it.
However as soon as he completed the game he was no longer able to launch it, the error he got just literally said "error" and then the game fully crashes.
Once he starts seeing this issue, in order to play he needs to delete the app data and start the game over again from scratch.

2 stars because when the game works it is fun, but having a constantly crashing game after you reach a certain point in it is just not good

As two other reviews have stated:

Really enjoyed the core gameplay and atmosphere, but unfortunately the technical issues have soured the experience for me on Quest 3.
On the second day reopening the app, I had already lost progress once, which felt like foreshadowing for bigger issues later on. After finally completing the game, the app now won’t launch past the first logo screen. It goes black and throws an “error” message every time.
I only recently bought the game/expansion pack, so it’s pretty disappointing to already be running into major issues like this.
I’ve now had to delete and reinstall the game, meaning more lost progress again.
There’s definitely a really fun game underneath all this, but it needs stability work badly.
A few other things I struggled with:
Better access/explanation of weapons for newer players
A more detailed tutorial
The game never really teaches how to properly one-shot Titans or achieve max speed/inertia consistently
Weapon scaling/balance feels a bit off at times
I can see the potential and had fun with it overall, but at the moment the crashes and progress loss make it hard to fully recommend.

reviews.review_title: Black screen ERROR code upon start up
reviews.review_description: I recently beat the game after purchasing the DLC and as of today, 5.28.2026, I am unable to even start the game. when i try to start the game the wings of freedom show up and then immediately goes to a pitch black screen that says airor in small text. i can no longer play on that save i have to uninstall the entire game and start from the beginning to even play the game anymore. i did find this game really really fun since i love attack on titan but this whole situation about having to restart just because i already beat the game and forcefully having to play through it again after wiping all data just to play the game isn't very fun

I give this game a 5 star. I brought the whole game, and the way it was interactive with the story mode was so fun.

What I suggest adding is a solo mode where you can just zip around the town and kill titans (unless that’s multiplayer which I haven’t tried), or change survival mode to have no Armored Titan.

BUT OVERALL REALLY FUN GAME!

Update: can no longer play the game for some reason…it just crashes trying to load.

A very solid game with great mechanics that could use a bit of polishing. As many other reviews, the only way you can "play" this game is if you restart from the beginning by deleting your app data. It has a bug where once you reach a certain point, it crashes after you open the app again. If the developers could fix this one issue im
Sure it'd bring more people into this game. Will update review once it actually works.  5/25/2026

I’m not gonna call you lazy like the other people writing reviews, they definitely couldn’t have made the game but please add more. This is a great game. Something that would be fun is story’s and like campaigns, and there could even be more battles like rumbling, or battling the beast titan. This is a great game but please add more! This game has so much potential, amaze those people calling you lazy!!!

The game is super fun, and as a AOT super fan I can say that it is anime accurate.

 Graphics are pretty good and the gameplay is engaging. 

One problem is that if you dont wanna pay for the expansion (like me) then there is a very limited amount of story to progress through. 

Another big thing is that there is no open world, to me that is something that would benefit the game exponentially. 

A little buggy, and the devs do NOT give the game the attention it deserves. 

Overall worth the money, but open world would make it much better.

the gameplay is fun overall, it leans a little too much into the main characters glazing you which is annoying but it's a good game, just needs more content. An idea would be to copy aot final battle with how the MC dies and leaves the journal to Eren, which could switch us to Eren so they could add shifting without it not making sense. Good game especially for vr standards however it is a little short.

Holy, Aot has the best potential for games and I love this game and it still has so much more potential these lazy  devs needs to do something with the game, I probably spent more time on this review then the devs on the game, however how it is, it’s one of if not the best game I have played I would totally recommend

reviews.review_title: The 4 year old reviewers are the problem
reviews.review_description:
People rate this game 1 star because there's no titan shifting. The game promises you the experience of a trained scout. NOT a marlyean spy. How would titan shifting even work in this game? The only points of damage on a titan is its limbs that you can slice, along with its nape. You literally play as an unnamed, noncanon character. What titan do you expect to inherit?
The only thing I REALLY want in this game, is freeroa with randomly spawning titans, and maybe more dlc boss fights. There's an entire map that you can't even access because of the mission areas. 
The only problem I see with this game, is that it attempts to be an aot fans biggest fantasy. Getting glazed by the main characters gets kind of annoying after some time. There's not much story across each mission, but thats not much of a problem.

reviews.review_title: Very fun, just needs a little more work
reviews.review_description:
I love this game and I've been hooked on it for weeks... But, here's some things that the developers need to do.

Make shifting- this game mechanic would be awesome to add.

Make the games graphics a bit better- when the games trailer came out it looked like this cinematic video game with the classic AOT look, but then we got the actual gameplay and it didn't really look like the AOT vr game I was hoping for.

Next is a free rom- free rom would be amazing for the game, and having characters from the anime give you missions would be even better.

New bosses for the base game- I haven't gotten the DLC yet, so I've bin a bit bummed when I just don't have any bosses to fight, so maybe could you add the beast titan as a boss for the game.

New maps- a map outside the walls having you use a horse would be a fun little add to the game . 

advanced ODM gear- the ODM gear that we got in the game gets you to were you need to be, but I'd like a mode where you could do flips and tricks like they do in the anime.

But let's put aside all the criticism and let me say, this game is a masterpiece in its own right, the mechanics and the gameplay and the voices of the characters is just amazing, and it set a pretty high standard for AOT games, official or fan made.
(I will also add to this review every time I hear something cool that could be added, and thank you for updating the game, just one update, even if it is just a bug fix).
Whenever I open the app I see the logo but then it cuts to a black screen that says error and it kicks me out of the game.. Please fix this.

Number one I know a lot of people are asking for this but Titan shifting, it would be really cool if we could tie and shift like the armored Titan because with Titan shifters when you activate it, it will depend on the Titan you got, and the Titans can be available by doing new quest speaking of quest number two they should also add quests that you can either get money and this money you can customize your hands and you can also activate gloves and it can also give you Titan serum that will make you into a titan and also they should add number three healing in multiplayer if you die in multiplayer, your teammate should have the ability to revive you and that’s all I have goodbye ￼

Igameplay was so short. beat the game in like an hour and a half. although, I love aot and this game was still very fun. but I wish there were more things to do. I also wish there was a free roam outside the walls like the giant forest and horses, now that would be amazing

reviews.review_title: great game but needs new additions
reviews.review_description: attack on titan has such good game potential as an anime especially on vr i love the movement on this i think the titans look cool and i like all the blades etc but it needs new additions like mores boss battles a new map different titans even maybe in the future a shifting ability this game has holy potential its just kinda been abandoned but i would still recommend if u like the idea of swinging and just killing titans

I really loved the shading and the style and the style! Swinging around with the ODM gear really made me feel like an actual scout! By the way if your game is crashing, I request to try restarting your VR headset, reinstall the game, and checking if your VR needs any software updates.

There are a few AoT fan made games that blow this out of the water, and there all free. This $8-$20 game is fun, for about two hours. After you finish all the missions, you can either do multiplayer or survival, which is not great for a $20 purchase. I was super excited for this, expecting it to be like the fan games, but with more features and better graphics. But it just isn’t worth the money compared to the free fan made games. It’s just a crash grab.

This game is a great game for what it is. The characters are the main cast; Eren, Mikasa, Armin, and Levi. The story is shown in small 3D cutscenes and is very simple overall. You play as a scout with the mission of either fighting titans, grabbing supplies, or defending points. The base game is fine but not a lot of people play online unless you join the discord. The story is also fine, it’s only 15 mission with 10 in the base game and 5 - including the boss. THIS PART IS VERY IMPORTANT because this game is not AoT the game it’s more of AoT simulator. The game is only about playing as a scout and fighting Titans and only that. This game is meant to fill the void for AoT fans craving something after the show and manga and people who have never watched AoT getting introduced to the series. This game is a game about the scouts and that’s all it will ever be, so no Titan shifting or anything else form the show or manga. ALSO VERY IMPORTNAT IS THE FACT THAT THE GAME MAES YOU RESET YOUR DATA RANDOMLY.

This is such a great game! It has 4 chapters and each one it gets harder, but you get better supplies as you go on! The quality of the game is so good and the odm gear works amazing! There are different blades and there are even thunder spears! You can play multiplayer and there are multiple difficulties for every level, I have only been playing for a few weeks and I’m already finished with solo and multiplayer! The add on (which you have to buy) only gives you like, 1 extra level so they NEED to add more! This game is my favorite on the VR and I play it all the time with my siblings, and I was very disappointed that I paid $12 just to get a few or one extra levels. I definitely think it’s worth getting but it would be awesome if more was added  -I don’t know if their still coming out or not- but the games quality is SO good and there’s so much to it with tons of details I think adding more would be completly possible and would be the coolest. I think a few things that should be added are Titan shifting, a level where you can travel all over the map and have titans roaming freely that you can kill (free random level like survival), and you should DEFINITELY be able to travel ON the walls! But that’s it for now, everyone should totally get this game it’s awesome! Thank you!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review. The base game includes the main story, and extra content is available as an optional expansion pack.

reviews.review_description: For what I had to pay it should come with what's in the expansion. fan games like attack on quest offer so much more to do and play around with even tho there is no story to it. It has multiplayer, people can shift into titans, it has several HUGE maps along with being able to spawn and fight the Warhammer and armored titans. And in terms of story in unbreakable. there wasn't much of one all you did was kill 2 to 4 titans a mission wile trying to protect some dumb building. If this is the quality that gets 4.3 stars then no wonder people are switching to pc vr or just straight up not getting a headset. when a game like attack on quest can offer more and is FREE. You genuinely don't have an excuse for this lack of quality and contant.
It's amazing but it could be better if you add more  Titans for example the colossal Titan, female Titan , beast Titan...

This is the most amazing attack on titan game I’ve ever played. I’ve tried so many AOT games and none of them have met my expectations. I’ve tried things like Blade and sorcery, people playground mods, and even Roblox. But this game is amazing everything from resheathing the swords to the options of taking the titans down, it is truly an amazing experience. The Gore is perfect because there’s not too much and there’s not too little. ￼ the only thing that I wish you guys can add is to make a game mode where you’re just in the normal city and amounts of Titans are just coming in and you  can slay them for as long as you want. ￼ other this is the most peak and exiting game I’ve ever played.

This game is amazing with great and very smooth gameplay mechanics and weapon variety but could do with a huge content update. You guys (the developers) should add much more to the campaign (such as the entirety of the story 🤣) and expand further into the story of aot whilst keeping balanced and enjoyable gameplay. There should also be better character customisation such as levels, skill tree, point attributes, titan customisation. There should also be Titan shifting and a world beyond the walls you could visit as a scout and such. As I said, great game, just needs a lot more content and it  would be top class

This game is amazing it is so fun to play it just needs titan shifting and more boss fights like a female titan, colossal titan and a beast titan boss fight maybe even add the rumbling this game has so much potential and it is already amazing.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your 5-star review. We’re glad to hear you’re enjoying the game, and we appreciate your suggestions about Titan shifting and additional boss fights.
